name: ninja
description: Silent Ninja Companion — a small desktop friend
author: ToriiLabs

scripts.predev: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('py -3 scripts/build-tray-icon.py',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.log('[predev] tray-icon build skipped (Python or Pillow missing). Tray will fall back to idle.png at runtime.')}"
scripts.build:icons: npm run build:tray && npm run build:icon
scripts.predist: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('py -3 scripts/build-app-icon.py && py -3 scripts/build-tray-icon.py',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.log('[predist] icon build skipped (Python missing). Falling back to placeholder icons; ship-quality icons require running npm run build:icons.')}"
